properties.query:
let timeRange = 10m;
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s == "Allow"
| where isnotempty(clientIP_s)
| where policyMode_s <> "prevention"
| summarize by clientIP_s, requestUri_s, ruleName_s
properties.description: Detección de trafico permitido en waf por reglas
